content.rendered:
In the kitchen (keittiössä) there are quite a few machines and objects that it would be handy to know the names of! Learn the Finnish names of the dishes and kitchen appliances!

Kodinkoneet – Home appliances

Finnish English
uuni oven
liesi, hella stove
keittolevyt cooking plates
mikroaaltouuni microwave oven
mikro (spoken) microwave oven
astianpesukone dishwasher
tiskikone (spoken) dishwasher
vohvelirauta waffle iron
liesituuletin cooker hood
jääkaappi fridge
vatkain whisker, beater
yleiskone food processor
tehosekoitin blender
sauvasekoitin hand-held mixer
vedenkeitin water heater
leivänpaahdin toaster
pakastin freezer
kahvinkeitin coffee machine

Katettu pöytä – The set table

Finnish English
haarukka fork
lusikka spoon
veitsi knife
teelusikka teaspoon
ruokalusikka tablespoon
lautanen plate
syvä lautanen soup plate
lasi glass
vesilasi water glass
viinilasi wine glass
kuppi cup
muki mug
teevati saucer
suolakko salt shaker
pippurisirotin pepper shaker
pöytäliina tablecloth
munakuppi egg cup
kulho bowl
sokerikko sugar bowl
kahvipannu coffee pot
teekannu teapot
maitokannu milk jug
kauha scoop

Muita tarvikkeita – Other necessities

Finnish English
kaulin rolling pin
(uuni)vuoka baking tray
tiskiaine (spoken) washing up liquid
astianpesuaine washing up liquid
ajastin timer
talouspaperi kitchen roll
siivilä strainer
kuivauskaappi drying cupboard
keittiöpyyhe kitchen towel
juustoraastin cheese grater
juustohöylä cheese slicer
säilytysrasia storage box
leikkuulauta cutting board
esiliina, essu apron
vesihana water tap
paistinpannu frying pan
kattila sauce pan
hammastikku toothpick
korkkiruuvi corkscrew
pullonavaaja bottle opener
lautasliina napkin
tarjoiluvati serving dish
tuhkakuppi ashtray
moppi mop
keittiövaaka kitchen scale
pizzaleikkuri pizza cutter
suppilo funnel
pannunalunen trivet
pannulappu pot holder
sihti strainer
(pesu)rätti, siivousliina cloth, rag
kuorimaveitsi peeling knife
valkosipulimurskain garlic crusher
pakasterasia freezer container
suodatinpussi coffee filter

Now that you’ve had a chance to learn these dishes and kitchen appliances, how about you  learn some cooking verbs next? These words that express quantity are also great to learn!

excerpt.rendered: Here you can find an extensive list of Finnish names for Dishes and Kitchen Appliances. Learn some kitchen vocabulary to communicate “keittiössä”!
